calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court declined to rule on Ms. Lerche's oral request on behalf of the plaintiff to dismiss the case without prejudice as the matter is not before the court.

As to the Court's tentative ruling, there being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARISSA KORBEL'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Motion To Dismiss is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
